Discover QVC's signature brand of high quality kitchenware. Innovative appliances loved by cooking novices and budding chefs alike, this range brings performance and practicality to your kitchen.
Bring your spring garden dreams to life! Discover inspiration, tips, and must-have finds to help your outdoor space bloom this season.
Glow at 1PM with Bobbi Brown! Discover iconic beauty essentials and expert tips designed to enhance your natural look and inspire your makeup routine.

Tune in to see the best beauty products that Bobbi Brown has to offer. Whether you're a fan already, or you're willing to be wooed, these natural-toned make-up picks will be love at first sight!
Showcasing a wide range of beautiful Diamonique designs in both silver and gold, this show offers an emporium of both the classic and essential looks plus unusual rare cuts and sparkling colours.

In 1968, a beauty editor asked a dermatologist 'can great skin be created?' and Clinique was born. Formulated for maximum results without irritation, their skincare and make-up is still love by many.
Discover the world of Oisha - elegant jewellery that you'll treasure forever. Exquisitely crafted in India, each captivating piece will sit on your skin as a work of art in breath-taking detail.
